title: People of Pisces
location: A seven-story musician's tavern made of ancient kauri wood on a flowery hill
situation: A lone traveler with a rare Cuatro blade is sitting at a cloverleaf table inside the People of Pisces. He recently had a tense standoff with red-haired Shield Doncellas who surrounded him when he unsheathed his instrument. The Exhumerator watched from the balcony, and the tension was momentarily broken by a pianist playing Son Borinqueños. The scene is one of watchful waiting and musical intrigue.
knows: The People of Pisces is a seven-story ale joint made of ancient kauri wood
The Exhumerator is a leggy tall woman with red hair who watches from the balcony
The Shield Doncellas are red-haired armed maidens who serve The Exhumerator
Son Borinqueños is currently being played by a masked virtuoso pianist
Musicians and patrons are gathered for a festive melody
This is a músico's nest, a haven as esteemed as the Pearly Gates
does_not_know: The true identity of every patron
The hidden motives of the Shield Doncellas
The outcome of the current standoff
What secrets are kept in the thirty-six chambers of Burrow Fortress
